summary: POTUS retweet of the WhiteHouse video: a polished, emotionally-stirring patriotic montage set to a sung America-the-Beautiful-style track (transcript fragment 'Where skies are on...', music_score 0.81). It cuts between a slow-motion shot of Trump's family before a giant rippling American flag, a glowing close-up of a smiling Trump in a MAGA cap, a 'FOX NEWS PROJECTS — TRUMP ELECTED 47TH PRESIDENT' graphic, and a warm bokeh-lit moment, ending on a branded White House logo card. The triumphant 'morning in America' tone and slick editing make it a clearly produced, youth-appeal spectacle.

script.scene: Slow-motion shot from behind of Trump and family members standing reverently before an enormous rippling red-and-white American flag. Patriotic music begins; lyric '...where skies are...'
Glowing, backlit close-up of Trump smiling warmly at a podium microphone, wearing a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap and pink tie; soft crowd behind.
Stylized election-night graphic: 'FOX NEWS PROJECTS — TRUMP ELECTED 47TH PRESIDENT' with a checkmarked Trump photo and a Georgia results bar (Harris 48.4% / Trump 50.8%).
Warm, shallow-focus shot lit with red and gold bokeh of Trump and a woman seen from behind walking into an ornate room.
End card on black: white line-art illustration of the White House with text 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.'

notable_text: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN; FOX NEWS PROJECTS TRUMP ELECTED 47TH PRESIDENT; GEORGIA PRESIDENT HARRIS 48.4% TRUMP 50.8%; PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP; tweet (RT @WhiteHouse): 'Back to loving America again'
